subcodes.first_line: O two fresh blossoms in the garden of the love of God! His honor Furughi - upon him be the Glory of God - hath mentioned your devoted services to the friends of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو گل نوبهار محبت الله جناب فروغی علیه بهاء الله ذکر خدمتگذاری شما را باحبای الهی
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause
